generator.change: Kept the 1748px total figure width but widened the left per-case label column from 230px to 270px, reduced each evidence frame from 360px to 350px, and increased the row key/detail fonts to 22px/16px.

visual_evidence: The case IDs 597_597, 898_898, and 919_919 are larger and easier to scan at source scale and on PDF page 9.
The SR O/N labels remain visible in the left row label column without changing the selected original/noMDL start/end evidence frames.
The PDF page-9 render keeps Figure 4 at the top of the page with the caption attached and with Limitations and Ethical Considerations starting cleanly below.
Purple executed paths/action arrows and green reference paths remain distinguishable after the label-width change.
caveat: The figure still compresses three selected cases across four evidence columns, so per-frame details remain orientation evidence only and should not be treated as quantitative navigation evidence.
claim_boundary: Selected qualitative path inspection only; quantitative InternNav claims remain tied to the 99-episode paired run and official-scene load/render checks.
